documentation.content: Cloud Run service acumenai-api is returning server errors. Check: gcloud run services logs read acumenai-api --region=northamerica-northeast2 --limit=50

conditionThreshold.filter: resource.type = "cloud_run_revision" AND resource.labels.service_name = "acumenai-api" AND metric.type = "run.googleapis.com/request_count" AND metric.labels.response_code_class = "5xx"
